summary: M400 — Hotfix: defensive try/catch wrap on Character Builder steps so a render exception in any single step (build, stats, class) falls through to a safe step instead of black-screening the New Game flow on iPhone. Also moves the Silas conversation onto prologue_warning (the actual first dialog node players see) instead of the unused prologue_start, fixes a wood_shield item key reference (was undefined, would throw on the build-aware weapon gift path), and reuses the existing Silas Veilward sprite so the build-aware prologue gift actually fires.
